title: Europe There We Need To Talk
section_path: Europe There We Need To Talk
section_path_text: Europe There We Need To Talk
summary:
Main
Strong labour data out of the US pushed rate cut expectations even lower
The European Election confirmed the rise of euro-scepticism, causing elections in France and Belgium and threatening the coalition in Germany. Europe has been putting off a debate about its future for too long. Markets, who have always been uneasy with the imperfections of the monetary union are looking for answers.
